Who we are

About

Midwest Music Productions LLC is an independent music promotion company based in Lincoln, Nebraska. We exist for one reason: to give local artists real opportunities — real stages, real crowds, and real promotion across the Lincoln, Omaha, and surrounding region.

MMP has a passion for music and wants to grow the local music scene by connecting artist, venues, and people. Show up for our Punk in the Park Revival in September and stay tuned! We're building something worth being a part of.

LNK
Based in Lincoln, Nebraska — serving the entire region

100%
Independent — no corporate strings, no middlemen
